Payag

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
The Magi Follow the Star (folio 34 recto), from a Mirror of Holiness (Mir’at al-quds) of Father Jerome Xavier
by Payag
Mughal India, Allahabad, made for Prince Salim (1569–1627) · 1602–4 · Gum tempera, ink, and gold on paper
←Pissarro, Paulémile Attributed to Filippo Pedrini→
